Package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl

Class KnowledgeIngestorConnectorImpl

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.connect.impl.AbstractConnector<KnowledgeIngestorRequest,KnowledgeIngestorResponse>
org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl.KnowledgeIngestorConnectorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
KnowledgeIngestorConnector, Connector<KnowledgeIngestorRequest>
public class KnowledgeIngestorConnectorImpl extends AbstractConnector<KnowledgeIngestorRequest,KnowledgeIngestorResponse> implements KnowledgeIngestorConnector
Core implementation of the knowledge ingestor connector.

Execution flow per invocation:

  1. Split the input content into chunks using a recursive splitter.
  2. Attach source and any additional metadata key=value pairs.
  3. Build a local AllMiniLmL6V2EmbeddingModel (no external service required).
  4. Connect to pgvector and create the table if it does not exist.
  5. Embed and store all chunks via EmbeddingStoreIngestor.
  6. Return a KnowledgeIngestorResponse with the number of ingested chunks.

    • createEmbeddingModel

      protected dev.langchain4j.model.embedding.EmbeddingModel createEmbeddingModel(KnowledgeIngestorRequest request)
      Factory method — override in tests to inject a stubbed embedding model. Uses OpenAiEmbeddingModel when embeddingModelName is set, otherwise falls back to the local AllMiniLmL6V2EmbeddingModel.

    • createEmbeddingStore
